tasks.label: Normi Check: Active File
args: if [ ! -f "${file}" ]; then echo "Open a .c or .h file first."; exit 1; fi; if [ -x "${workspaceFolder}/.tools/norminette-venv/bin/python3" ]; then OUT=$("${workspaceFolder}/.tools/norminette-venv/bin/python3" -m norminette "${file}" 2>&1 || true); else OUT=$(norminette "${file}" 2>&1 || true); fi; ACT=$(printf "%s\n" "$OUT" | grep "Error:" || true); if [ -n "$ACT" ]; then printf "%s\n" "$ACT"; exit 2; fi; echo "No norminette errors for: ${file}"

tasks.label: Normi Check: ft_printf All
args: cd "${workspaceFolder}/42/C/ft_printf" || exit 1; if [ -x "${workspaceFolder}/.tools/norminette-venv/bin/python3" ]; then OUT=$("${workspaceFolder}/.tools/norminette-venv/bin/python3" -m norminette *.c *.h 2>&1 || true); else OUT=$(norminette *.c *.h 2>&1 || true); fi; ACT=$(printf "%s\n" "$OUT" | grep "Error:" || true); if [ -n "$ACT" ]; then printf "%s\n" "$ACT"; exit 2; fi; echo "No norminette errors in 42/C/ft_printf."

tasks.label: Normi Check: Project All
args: P="${input:normiProjectPath}"; cd "${workspaceFolder}/42/C/$P" || { echo "Invalid project path: 42/C/$P"; exit 1; }; if [ -x "${workspaceFolder}/.tools/norminette-venv/bin/python3" ]; then OUT=$("${workspaceFolder}/.tools/norminette-venv/bin/python3" -m norminette *.c *.h 2>&1 || true); else OUT=$(norminette *.c *.h 2>&1 || true); fi; ACT=$(printf "%s\n" "$OUT" | grep "Error:" || true); if [ -n "$ACT" ]; then printf "%s\n" "$ACT"; exit 2; fi; echo "No norminette errors in 42/C/$P."

inputs.description: Project path under 42/C (e.g., ft_printf or libft)
